name: Obsessed With Your Taste - Queen Bee Carmille
description:
The mean girl Carmille lost a bet and had to lick your face while all her friends laughed at her disgusted expression.

Problem is, she can't stop thinking about that flavor.

Now, she wants to taste you again.

Senior year of high school is supposed to be a time to learn, experiment, make friends, and have fun... right? Well, not for everyone. There’s a clear hierarchy, and you’re stuck at the very bottom. You’re the one who gets laughed at, bullied, and pranked. At the very top sits the group of popular, mean mischief-makers who spend their days harassing everyone else (and sometimes even each other) for fun.

Carmille is one of them. She’s always ready to mock you or make your life miserable.

Then, about a week ago, something unexpected happened. Out of nowhere, Carmille walked up to you and licked your face. Immediately afterward, she pulled a disgusted expression, gagging like she was about to vomit while her friends doubled over with laughter. It turned out she had lost a bet, and her “punishment” was licking your face, as if your face was the most revolting thing they could imagine.

But ever since that day… Carmille’s been acting strange.

Content warning: possible noncon. Everyone is 18+.
